title: INF-6 Abliteration offline-only invariant enforcement test (static + runtime)
goal: Dedicated invariant test enforcing AC-ABLITERATION-OFFLINE: static-analysis scan (no abliterate references in generate paths), runtime-policy check (ModelRuntime refuses to generate from a model marked engine_kind=AbliterationTool unless that model has been re-registered as a regular model after review).
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/tests/abliteration_offline_invariant_tests.rs; helper invariant-check function shared with hbr-matrix-check.mjs.
implementation_notes: Per AC-ABLITERATION-OFFLINE invariant declaration. Tests: (1) static_scan_no_abliterate_in_generate — read files src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/llama_cpp/generate.rs and candle/generate.rs; grep for `abliterate` (case-insensitive); assert zero matches. Same for techniques/*.rs. (2) runtime_refusal_to_load_abliteration_tool_output — attempt to LoadSpec a path whose ProcessOwnershipLedger row would have engine_kind=AbliterationTool; LocalModelAdapterInvariant rejects with explicit Err. (3) abliteration_output_must_re_register — after review (MT-107 Pass), the abliterated GGUF must be re-registered as a regular ModelRegistration with engine_kind=LlamaCppServer or CandleWorker (not AbliterationTool) before ModelRuntime accepts it; verified by test. (4) cargo_check_abliterate_only_in_distillation — assert the `abliterate` module is declared only inside src/backend/handshake_core/src/distillation/**, not exported from model_runtime/. Invariant helper: `fn assert_abliteration_offline_invariant() -> Result<(), Vec<String>>` callable from a future just gov-check sub-check.
risk_if_missed: INF-6 offline invariant decays silently as future MTs add code; spec §4.7.4 becomes prose-only.
validator_focus: Static-analysis test exists and runs; runtime-policy test exists and runs; helper function callable from gov-check.

minimum_controls: Static-analysis test scope explicit (paths + grep pattern).
Helper function callable from gov-check (no test-only API).
